summary: ABICAR-Style Contract PDF Testing - All endpoints working correctly. Fixed critical bug with corrupted signature images causing PDF generation failures (500 errors).

features_tested.POST /api/admin/contracts/generate: PASS - Returns contract_id for existing reservation
features_tested.GET /api/contracts/{id}: PASS - Returns all new ABICAR fields (contract_number, vehicle_color, client_nationality, start_time, end_time, km_start, price_per_day, deductible, agency_address, agency_phone)
features_tested.GET /api/contracts/{id}/pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF with ABICAR-style sections
features_tested.PUT /api/contracts/{id}/send: PASS - Marks contract as sent, updates status
features_tested.PUT /api/contracts/{id}/sign: PASS - Accepts signature data, marks as signed
features_tested.GET /api/admin/contracts: PASS - Lists all contracts for agency

abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Header (Title): CONTRAT DE LOCATION / RENTAL CONTRACT with agency name
abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Tenant Section: Responsable, Nom, Prenom, Nationalite, Permis fields
abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Dates/Km Section: Date de Prise, Date de Retour, Heure, Km Depart, Km Retour
abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Pricing Table: Par Jour, Week-end, Par Semaine, Par Mois pricing grid
abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Financial Summary: Depot, PRIX INCLUS TVA, Total paye client
abicar_pdf_sections_verified.Signature Area: Signature label with line or embedded image

bug_fixed.issue: PDF generation failing with 500 error for contracts with corrupted/invalid signature images
bug_fixed.root_cause: Signature image validation happened during doc.build() not during image decode, causing unhandled OSError
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added PIL Image.verify() validation before adding RLImage to story in /app/backend/routes/contracts.py lines 331-350
bug_fixed.status: FIXED - All PDF downloads now work correctly

test_classes: TestABICARContractGeneration - 10 tests (contract generation, ABICAR fields, PDF, send, sign, list)
TestABICARPDFContentValidation - 3 tests (French labels, financial summary, signature area)

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation code now properly validates signature images before rendering
All ABICAR-style fields are correctly populated from reservation, vehicle, user, and agency documents
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing reservations and contracts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract PDF generation with ABICAR-style format is fully functional. The generate_contract_pdf() function in routes/contracts.py creates professional Swiss-style rental contracts with all required sections. Bug fix applied to handle corrupted signature images gracefully. All 16 tests passing.
